articles.title: Netherlands opt to bowl under cloud, Gardner back, Hamilton in
articles.description: Gardner returns from injury in place of Harris while Hamilton makes her T20 World Cup debut in place of Schutt

articles.title: Afghanistan opt to bat; Reddy, Prasidh and Dubey return for India
articles.description: The teams made seven changes between them, with India bulking up on allrounders

articles.title: Baartman knocks Freedom down before Orcas batters complete comprehensive win
articles.description: Two overs from Ottneil Baartman - the 15th and the 17th - made the difference as he picked up four wickets to prevent Washington Freedom from getting a match-winning total

articles.title: Munro and Holder lead Knight Riders past Unicorns in 14-overs a side contest
articles.description: Lhuan-dre Pretorius hit a 28-ball 58 to give San Francisco Unicorns a solid 150 after their 14 overs, but Los Angeles Knight Riders got past the line with two balls in hand

articles.title: Abbas, Dal wreck Lancashire before Montgomery cements Derbyshire advantage
articles.description: Visitors succumb for 161 at Chesterfield as hosts take early control

articles.title: Du Plessis 113* trumps Seifert 104 as TSK begin season with big win
articles.description: He became the oldest centurion in T20 history as TSK chased down 221 with nine balls remaining

articles.title: Lewis, Prendergast fifties in vain as Melie magic helps NZ win a thriller
articles.description: Melie struck twice in an over as Ireland, who were 116 for 1 at one stage chasing 141, fell short by four runs

articles.title: Pant set to be traded to Delhi Capitals for USD 1.5 million; LSG to get Kuldeep in return
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo has learned that Pant will go to DC for INR 15 crore

articles.title: Ganguly and Yuvraj set for senior leadership roles in Delhi Capitals in IPL 2027
articles.description: While Ganguly is set to be named the DC head coach, Yuvraj is likely to be signed up as the batting coach

articles.title: Ecclestone: 'Dean a great captain, everyone feels calm under her'
articles.description: While Ecclestone agreed it would be "pretty weird" to not have Sciver-Brunt in a World Cup game, she was confident in Dean's leadership skills

articles.title: Will Vaibhav Sooryavanshi be targeted in tri-series final after heated altercation? Sri Lanka A captain Sahan Arachchige shares candid take
articles.description: Sri Lanka A captain Sahan Arachchige drew the battle lines ahead of his team's tri-series final against India A at the Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium on Sunday, June 21.

articles.title: Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: ‘Like a duck to water’ - Sophie Ecclestone confident Charlie Dean will shine as stand-in captain
articles.description: "It's pretty weird not to have Nat in a World Cup game, but Charlie's been amazing... she's been such a great captain, everyone feels so calm under Charlie," said Ecclestone.

articles.title: 'No compromises' - Sunil Gavaskar wants BCCI to crack down on IPL no-show overseas stars
articles.description: "They should also ban those who come to the IPL and, when they find they aren't being picked regularly, feign an injury and return home and then play in their domestic cricket," wrote Gavaskar.

articles.title: Bangladesh vs Australia Prediction, 3rd T20I – Who will win today’s match between BAN vs AUS?
articles.description: Australia won the 2nd T20I by 7 runs, and now have an unassailable 2-0 lead in the series.

articles.title: 'Really just trying to enjoy my cricket' - Henry Nicholls after second-innings century to decimate England
articles.description: Nicholls came into the squad in the wake of the talismanic Kane Williamson announcing his retirement from all formats of the game.

articles.title: Hardik Pandya's fitness could be key to India's 2027 ODI World Cup hopes: WV Raman
articles.description: Pandya's ability to balance the side by serving as a genuine pace-bowling all-rounder makes him one of India's most valuable assets in the 50-over format.

articles.title: IND vs AFG 2026: Is Harshit Rana playing 3rd ODI?
articles.description: India made three changes to their playing XI from Lucknow; Afghanistan, on the other hand, made four.

articles.title: Reports: Hardik Pandya ruled out of England tour, Virat Kohli asked to get fitness clearance
articles.description: Hardik has yet to recover from the quadricep injury that he went through while recuperating from the back spasm. On the other hand, Kohli is also undergoing a recovery from his hamstring injury.

articles.title: 'It's the truth, and it feels bitter automatically' - Aakash Chopra addresses criticism over Harshit Rana's selection in 3rd ODI
articles.description: Amid the criticism over Harshit Rana's surprising selection to the Indian team ahead of the third ODI against Afghanistan, Aakash Chopra revealed the protocol which is followed in such situations.

articles.title: 'You do not judge a player in one year' - Mohammad Kaif shares brutal remark on potential trade deal after IPL 2026
articles.description: Mohammad Kaif did not hold back while calling out the recent reports of a trade between Delhi Capitals and the Lucknow Super Giants, where Rishabh Pant and Kuldeep Yadav could swap jerseys.
